zh.lifeSummary: 當William G Wall於1489年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Richard Wall26歲，母親Margaret Whalley22歲。他於1515年與Elizabeth Taylor在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1525年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William G Wall于1489年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Richard Wall26岁，母亲Margaret Whalley22岁。他于1515年与Elizabeth Taylor在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1525年在他的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a stone-built wall, e.g. one used to fortify a town or to keep back the encroachment of the sea (Middle English wall ‘wall’, Old English wall, weall, from Latin vallum ‘rampart, palisade’), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Wall (Staffordshire).
English (West Midlands): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, northern Middle English wall(e) (Old English (Mercian) wæll(a); compare Well ).
Irish (of Norman origin): Anglicized form of de Valle (Gaelicized form de Bhál), the name of a Norman family established in Munster and Connacht.

variants.name: Wallander
meanings: Swedish: variant of Wall , with the addition of the suffix -ander, derived from Greek anēr (genitive andros) ‘man’.

variants.name: Wallenberg
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements Wall + the plural suffix - en (originally German) + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

History: While working as a businessman in Budapest in 1944, Raoul Wallenberg (1912–?47) was entrusted by the Swedish government with the protection of Hungarian Jews from the Nazis. Wallenberg helped about 95,000 Jews to escape death by issuing them Swedish passports. When Soviet forces took control of Budapest in 1945, he was arrested, taken to Moscow, and imprisoned. The Soviet authorities stated that he died in prison in 1947.

variants.name: Well
meanings: English (London): topographic name for someone who lived near a spring or stream, from Middle English well(e) ‘spring, stream, well’ (Old English well(a)).
German: from a short form of the personal names Wallo, Walilo.
German: nickname from Middle High German wël ‘round’.

variants.name: Walle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Arnulfo, Efrain, Emilia, Evodio, Frederico, Jaime, Javier, Jesus, Jose, Juan, Justo.
English and German: variant of   Wall  . This surname is also found in Mexico.

variants.name: Wallen
meanings: Swedish (mainly Wallén): topographic or ornamental name composed of a variant of the element vall ‘grassy bank, pasture’ (see Wall ) or the root of Latin vallis ‘valley’ (representing Swedish dal) + the adjectival suffix -én/-en, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Wallin and Walen .

variants.name: Walls
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of Wall , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Derry): in Ireland this name is also sometimes a variant of   Walsh  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William G Wall was born in 1489, in Preston, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Wall, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Whalley, was 22. He married Elizabeth Taylor in 1515, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William G Wall est né en 1489, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Wall, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whalley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Taylor en 1515, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William G Wall 1489 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Wall 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Whalley 22. Er hat 1515 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Taylor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1525 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William G Wall è nato il nel 1489 nel Preston, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Wall, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Whalley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Taylor nel 1515, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William G Wallが1489年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父Richard Wallは26歳，母Margaret Whalleyは22歳であった。1515年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでElizabeth Taylorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1525年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William G Wall(이)가 1489년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Wall(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Whalley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Elizabeth Taylor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1525년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William G Wall nasceu em 1489, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Wall, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whalley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Taylor em 1515, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William G Wall родился в 1489 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Wall было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whalley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Taylor в 1515 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William G Wall nació en 1489, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Wall, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Whalley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Taylor en 1515, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
